text.message: It's blue.  Am I going crazy?
Green and red both have good port
And you have a city, open settle, and road play
Just feed him the settle.  Good good
Yeah because I thought you'd all recognize him as the leader lol
Sorry, not harping on you specifically
clearly this is not a way to make everyone happy in this game
Red will claim army next round
unlike you fishing for wood from last
but red is still the block
U were so afraid of me
